Document:
# Guide to Faction Sustainability
[textlink="View Full Wiki Page" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Guide%20to%20Faction%20Sustainability"/]
# Guide to Faction Sustainability: Munitions & Medicine
This guide outlines the essential loops for replenishing a faction's supplies mid-round, focusing on ammunition production and medical farming.
## Ammunition Production
When round-start supplies are exhausted, combat effectiveness depends on a steady logistical chain of lead, steel, and gunpowder.
There are three primary ways to gather the raw materials needed for casings and bullets:
[bold]Salvaging:[/bold] Searching junk piles, shelves, and crates in the wastes or bunkers. This is the most efficient method in the early game.
[bold]Dismantling:[/bold] Breaking down wrecked cars or vehicles found on roads and in junkyards. This provides a significant yield of [bold]Lead[/bold] and [bold]Steel[/bold] scraps.
[bold]Mining:[/bold] The least viable method. Ore veins (Coal, Sulfur, Iron) have low yields and inconsistent drops, making it difficult to target specific materials.
Standard ammunition requires an [bold]Ammo Bench[/bold]. Ensure you have the following materials inserted into the workbench:
[bold]Ammo Type[/bold] [bold]Lead (Bar)[/bold] [bold]Steel (Sheet)[/bold] [bold]Gunpowder[/bold] [bold]Secondary Mat[/bold] [bold]5.56mm[/bold] 1.5 2.25 1.5 1 Cardboard [bold]Shotgun Shell[/bold] 0.6 0 0.6 1 Cardboard and 1 Paper
[italic]Note: Cardboard is crafted from 2x Paper. Paper is crafted from 1x Wood Plank.[/italic]
Gunpowder is the most complex component and must be crafted via the crafting menu. There are two ways to produce it:
[bold]Recipe:[/bold] 1x Fertilizer + 1x Coal + 1x Sulfur.
[bold]Coal:[/bold] Processed in a [bold]Forge[/bold] from [bold]Charcoal[/bold] (1 Plank = 1 Charcoal; 1.5 Charcoal = 1 Coal).
[bold]Fertilizer/Sulfur:[/bold] Primarily obtained through mining or faction base stockpiles.
If you have access to a [bold]Chemical Set[/bold] and beakers, you can produce gunpowder in bulk with much higher efficiency.
[bold]Grinding:[/bold] Use a [bold]Mortar and Pestle[/bold] (crafted with 2x Wood) to grind Sulfur, Fertilizer, and Coal (which becomes Carbon) into a liquid form.
[bold]Mixing:[/bold] Collect the resulting liquids into a [bold]Chemical Set[/bold].
[bold]Ratios:[/bold] Redistribute the chemicals into a single beaker in a strict [bold]1:1:1 ratio[/bold] (For example, 30u Sulfur : 30u Fertilizer : 30u Carbon).
[bold]Final Step:[/bold] It will consume the units directly from the beaker and drop the gunpowder on the ground, allowing for rapid, large-scale production.
## Medical Supplies & Farming
Medical sustainability relies on the cultivation of [bold]Broc Flower[/bold] and [bold]Xander Root[/bold].
Farming is a precise cycle. If you miss a step(especially clipping), you may lose your ability to replant for the rest of the round.
[bold]Planting:[/bold] Start with an empty planter. With a [bold]Plant Clipping[/bold] in your hand, click the planter to sow the crop (clippings function as seeds).
[bold]Weeding:[/bold] Use a [bold]Hoe[/bold] to remove weeds. This can be done either before planting to prep the soil or after the plant has started growing.
[bold]Hydration & Nutrition:[/bold]
Keep the water level stable.
To boost nutrition, collect **Dung** from Brahmin or Brahdo using a bucket or compost bag.
Insert the compost bag into a **Composer**, then use [bold]Alt+Click[/bold] (or right-click) to toggle the machine on.
Once processed into compost, click the planter with the compost in hand.
[bold]Clipping (Crucial):[/bold] Once the plant has grown, you [bold]must[/bold] use **Plant Clipper** on it before harvesting. This gives you a new clipping to replant.
[bold]Harvesting:[/bold] After clipping, you can harvest the plant.
[italic]Warning: Each plant can only be clipped once. If you harvest before clipping, you officially lose the ability to replant that crop unless you find a new wild source.[/italic]
If your faction does not have a [bold]Seed Extractor[/bold], you must use [bold]Plant Clippers[/bold]:
Click a mature crop with the scissors to get a clipping.
[bold]Warning:[/bold] Each plant can only be clipped once. If you harvest a plant without clipping it first, you lose the ability to replant it.
[bold]Crafting the Seed Extractor Frame:[/bold] To build the extractor, open your crafting menu and gather the following:
[bold]4x Planks[/bold]
[bold]1x Cooking Pot[/bold]
[bold]2x Steel Sheets[/bold]
[bold]1x Duct Tape[/bold]
[bold]Tool Required:[/bold] Screwdriver (to finish construction)
Once harvested, use a workbench or your crafting menu to create healing items:
[bold]Healing Powder:[/bold] 1x Broc Flower + 1x Xander Root.
[bold]Doctor Syringe:[/bold] 1x Plastic + 0.25 Steel (Crafted at a workbench).
[bold]Stimpak:[/bold] 1x Broc Flower + 1x Xander Root + 1x Bloodpack + 1x Doctor Syringe.
[italic]Note: Empty stimpaks cannot be refilled. Super Stimpaks and Dirty Stimpaks are currently uncraftable.[/italic]
